waves.title: Quick wins + security + a11y
waves.scope: правки классов / try-catch / новый безопасный IPC / a11y -- ничего не ломает

items.decision: toggleAutostart: backend status check (lib.rs:6337-6340) + frontend try/catch + rollback mirror toggleStartHidden
New delete_freellmapi_auth IPC + button next to hasEmail/hasToken badges
8 классов своп text-*-400/500 -> status-ok/warn/bad/info
DataTable th: заменить th/onclick на th > button (native keyboard + AT, чище, чем tabindex на th)
move focusin/focusout handlers from host div to per-toast .body (already focusable via close button)
ModalShell adds aria-labelledby/describedby via prop, ConfirmDialog supplies ids, requireText input ties to confirm button via aria-describedby

waves.title: UI-согласованность и проброс существующих API
waves.scope: визуальный паритет + добить IPC, которые уже готовы в backend

items.decision: npm install @lucide/svelte (NOT lucide-svelte, deprecated) + per-icon imports + заменить 8 файлов + Sidebar
widen actions column to 240px + drop duplicate Edit button in provider cell
clickKpi: добавить Repos (clear), Merged, Open -- все 5 становятся filters
list-style: none на <ol> + DataTable migration для per-model таблицы
Создать src/lib/components/SectionHeader.svelte + мигрировать UpdatesTab, ProvidersTab (Stack + Engines), EnvironmentsTab, AnalyticsTab
добавить backupDir в app_paths() + кнопка openPath
expose gateway_base_url() как IPC + заменить hardcode
Новый IPC canonical_skills_dir() mirrors gateway_base_url pattern

waves.title: Destructive guards + UX защитные сетки
waves.scope: confirm dialogs для опасных действий + навигация без потери фокуса

items.decision: wrap deleteWorkspace/removeFav/deleteServer(SSH)/TerminalPane.relaunch в askConfirm(danger:true, ...)
build details из panes.map(p => `${p.tool}@${p.profile} ${p.cwd}`) в sendToAll
replace app.exit(0) with emit('tray-quit-request'); +page.svelte confirm dialog с session count
skip tab jump when active !== 'updates' OR input is focused; otherwise run in background + toast
build summary string из MLKEY contents в toast.detail
quick-action row (Check all, Refresh forks, Start/Stop stack) + per-chip actions + 2 новых чипа (stack state, sessions active)

waves.title: Функциональные дополнения (новые IPC)
waves.scope: clone, explorer buttons, session counting, cancel-all, tray menu, parallel bulk

items.decision: second <section> с weekies list reusing existing snapshot plumbing
git CLI subprocess через #[tauri::command] clone_repo(url, target) + button + folder picker
openPath(pane.cwd) button in TerminalPane .bar
global_session_count() IPC reading state.0.lock().len(); FE uses MAX(globalCount + panes.length, MAX_PANES)
Promise.all + per-id log buffer with id tag, flush in spawn order

Расширенный tray: Refresh forks, Start/Stop stack, Open Backup, Open Settings, Refresh providers, Cancel all (per F21) + миграция существующего tray_menu() с Menu::with_items на MenuBuilder (current Tauri v2 API)
cancel_all RPC kills RunState+ForkRuns+PTYs + Ctrl+Shift+Esc binding + tray entry

waves.title: Архитектурное: автообновление
waves.scope: tauri-plugin-updater (через `tauri add updater`) + signer keys + latest.json + GitHub Actions tauri-action@v0 + Settings UI + restart prompt

items.decision: tauri add updater (canonical scaffold) + signer keypair + bundle.createUpdaterArtifacts:'v1Compatible' first then 'true' + capabilities updater:default + IPC check_for_update/download_and_install + Settings->About UI with release-notes preview + GitHub Actions tauri-action@v0 for artifact publish

execute_protocol.rules: auto-fix consumes this fix_plan.json: walks waves in order; each item approved=false by default, must be flipped to true before execution; verified post-condition runs the project's verify command (npm run check, npm test, npm run build); on regression, revert the wave and pause for human review.
execute_protocol.rollback_contract: each item must keep its blast_radius description accurate in items.json so the runner knows what to break-test on revert.
